title: CLAUDE.md
text: file provides guidance Claude Code (claude.ai/code) working code repository.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: cpp11bigwig R package providing read-access bigWig bigBed genomic data files. wraps libBigWig C library (v0.4.8, vendored src/libBigWig/) using cpp11 R/C++ integration.

title: CLAUDE.md
code: # Install package dependencies R -e "install.packages(c('cpp11', 'tibble', 'testthat'))" R -e "BiocManager::install(c('GenomicRanges', 'IRanges'))"  # Load package during development R -e "devtools::load_all()"  # Run all tests R -e "devtools::test()"  # Run a single test file R -e "testthat::test_file('tests/testthat/test-read.R')"  # Full package check R -e "devtools::check()"  # Rebuild C++ wrappers after modifying cpp11bigwig.cpp R -e "cpp11::cpp_register()"  # Rebuild libBigWig manually (rarely needed) cd src/libBigWig && make clean && make

title: CLAUDE.md
text: read_bigwig_cpp() - Reads bigWig intervals, merges consecutive intervals values read_bigbed_cpp() - Reads bigBed entries preserved end coordinates bigbed_sql_cpp() - Extracts autoSql schema bigBed files cpp11.cpp - Auto-generated cpp11::cpp_register() - never edit manually libBigWig/ - Vendored C library compiled static library (libBigWig.)

title: CLAUDE.md
text: read.r - Exported functions read_bigwig() read_bigbed() input validation output formatting cpp11.R - Auto-generated .Call wrappers - never edit manually

title: CLAUDE.md
text: src/Makevars triggers libBigWig compilation package compilation libBigWig compiled -O3 -DNOCURL -fpic (remote file support)

title: CLAUDE.md
text: bigWig reader merges consecutive intervals identical values bigBed reader preserves actual genomic coordinates (end +1 adjusted) Functions return tibbles default, optionally GRanges objects (via ="GRanges") C++ functions use [[cpp11::register]] attribute automatic wrapper generation libBigWig structures require proper cleanup: bwDestroyOverlappingIntervals(), bwClose()

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Uses testthat edition 3 snapshot testing error messages. Test data inst/extdata/ (test.bw, test.bb, test.bg).

title: Read bigWig and bigBed Files
text: cpp11bigwig provides read-access bigWig bigBed files using libBigWig https://github.com/dpryan79/libBigWig.

title: Read bigWig and bigBed Files
code: # Install development version from GitHub # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("rnabioco/cpp11bigwig")

title: Read bigWig and bigBed Files
code: library(cpp11bigwig)  bw <- system.file("extdata", "test.bw", package = "cpp11bigwig") read_bigwig(bw) #> # A tibble: 6 × 4 #>   chrom start   end value #>   <chr> <int> <int> <dbl> #> 1 1         0     1 0.100 #> 2 1         1     2 0.200 #> 3 1         2     3 0.300 #> 4 1       100   150 1.40  #> 5 1       150   151 1.5   #> 6 10      200   300 2  bb <- system.file("extdata", "test.bb", package = "cpp11bigwig") read_bigbed(bb) #> # A tibble: 3 × 12 #>   chrom  start    end name  score strand thickStart thickEnd reserved blockCount #>   <chr>  <int>  <int> <chr> <int> <chr>       <int>    <int>    <int>      <int> #> 1 chr1  4.80e6 4.84e6 test…     1 +         4797973  4836816        1          9 #> 2 chr10 4.85e6 4.88e6 diff…     1 +         4848118  4880877        1          6 #> 3 chr20 5.07e6 5.15e6 negs…     1 -         5073253  5152630        1         14 #> # ℹ 2 more variables: blockSizes <chr>, chromStarts <chr>

what: Report header metadata for a bigBed file. — bigbed_info
title: Report header metadata for a bigBed file. — bigbed_info
text: Reads bigBed header without loading intervals. useful identifying BED variant file holds reading : genuine BED12 defined_field_count == 12, whereas bed9+3 file (9 standard BED columns plus 3 custom fields) defined_field_count == 9 field_count == 12.

title: Report header metadata for a bigBed file. — bigbed_info
Report header metadata for a bigBed file. — bigbed_info
text: bbfile path URL bigBed file. Remote files (http://, https://, ftp://) supported package installed libcurl available.

title: Report header metadata for a bigBed file. — bigbed_info
text: named list elements version, n_chroms, field_count, defined_field_count, n_bases_covered, autosql (embedded autoSql schema string, "" file none).

title: Report header metadata for a bigBed file. — bigbed_info
code: bb <- system.file("extdata", "test.bb", package = "cpp11bigwig")  info <- bigbed_info(bb) info$defined_field_count #> [1] 12

what: Report header metadata and summary statistics for a bigWig file. — bigwig_info
title: Report header metadata and summary statistics for a bigWig file. — bigwig_info
text: Reads bigWig header without loading intervals. summary statistics (min, max, mean, std) file-level values stored header computed covered bases.

title: Report header metadata and summary statistics for a bigWig file. — bigwig_info
Report header metadata and summary statistics for a bigWig file. — bigwig_info
text: bwfile path URL bigWig file. Remote files (http://, https://, ftp://) supported package installed libcurl available.

title: Report header metadata and summary statistics for a bigWig file. — bigwig_info
text: named list elements version, n_levels, n_chroms, n_bases_covered, min, max, mean, std.

title: Report header metadata and summary statistics for a bigWig file. — bigwig_info

title: cpp11bigwig: read data from bigWig files — cpp11bigwig-package
text: https://github.com/dpryan79/libBigWig

text: Jay Hesselberth jay.hesselberth@gmail.com

what: Read data from bigBed files. — read_bigbed
title: Read data from bigBed files. — read_bigbed
text: Columns automatically typed based autoSql schema embedded bigBed file. Integer types (uint, int) become R integers, floating point types (float, double) become R doubles, types (including array types like int[blockCount]) remain character strings.

title: Read data from bigBed files. — read_bigbed
code: read_bigbed(bbfile, chrom = NULL, start = NULL, end = NULL)

title: Read data from bigBed files. — read_bigbed
text: bbfile path URL bigBed file. Remote files (http://, https://, ftp://) supported package installed libcurl available. chrom chromosome(s) read. Either character vector chromosome names, GenomicRanges::GRanges query regions (case start/end ignored). read_bigwig(), GRanges 1-based coordinates converted bigBed's 0-based half-open coordinates. start start position(s) data. May vector describing several ranges, recycled chrom/end. end end position(s) data. May vector describing several ranges, recycled chrom/start.

title: Read data from bigBed files. — read_bigbed
text: tibble

title: Read data from bigBed files. — read_bigbed
text: bigBed file embedded autoSql schema (example one produced bedToBigBed without -), columns still recovered using standard BED field names (name, score, strand, thickStart, thickEnd, itemRgb, blockCount, blockSizes, blockStarts) derived file's field counts. additional (bedN+) fields beyond standard BED columns returned generic fieldN character columns.

title: Read data from bigBed files. — read_bigbed
code: bb <- system.file("extdata", "test.bb", package = "cpp11bigwig")  read_bigbed(bb) #> # A tibble: 3 × 12 #>   chrom  start    end name  score strand thickStart thickEnd reserved blockCount #>   <chr>  <int>  <int> <chr> <int> <chr>       <int>    <int>    <int>      <int> #> 1 chr1  4.80e6 4.84e6 test…     1 +         4797973  4836816        1          9 #> 2 chr10 4.85e6 4.88e6 diff…     1 +         4848118  4880877        1          6 #> 3 chr20 5.07e6 5.15e6 negs…     1 -         5073253  5152630        1         14 #> # ℹ 2 more variables: blockSizes <chr>, chromStarts <chr>  read_bigbed(bb, chrom = "chr10") #> # A tibble: 1 × 12 #>   chrom  start    end name  score strand thickStart thickEnd reserved blockCount #>   <chr>  <int>  <int> <chr> <int> <chr>       <int>    <int>    <int>      <int> #> 1 chr10 4.85e6 4.88e6 diff…     1 +         4848118  4880877        1          6 #> # ℹ 2 more variables: blockSizes <chr>, chromStarts <chr>  # query several chromosomes in one call read_bigbed(bb, chrom = c("chr1", "chr10")) #> # A tibble: 2 × 12 #>   chrom  start    end name  score strand thickStart thickEnd reserved blockCount #>   <chr>  <int>  <int> <chr> <int> <chr>       <int>    <int>    <int>      <int> #> 1 chr1  4.80e6 4.84e6 test…     1 +         4797973  4836816        1          9 #> 2 chr10 4.85e6 4.88e6 diff…     1 +         4848118  4880877        1          6 #> # ℹ 2 more variables: blockSizes <chr>, chromStarts <chr>  # restrict each query to a window read_bigbed(bb, chrom = c("chr1", "chr10"), start = c(0, 0), end = c(5e6, 5e6)) #> # A tibble: 2 × 12 #>   chrom  start    end name  score strand thickStart thickEnd reserved blockCount #>   <chr>  <int>  <int> <chr> <int> <chr>       <int>    <int>    <int>      <int> #> 1 chr1  4.80e6 4.84e6 test…     1 +         4797973  4836816        1          9 #> 2 chr10 4.85e6 4.88e6 diff…     1 +         4848118  4880877        1          6 #> # ℹ 2 more variables: blockSizes <chr>, chromStarts <chr>  # pass a GRanges of regions; 1-based coords are converted automatically gr <- GenomicRanges::GRanges(   c("chr1", "chr10"),   IRanges::IRanges(start = 1, width = 1e7) ) read_bigbed(bb, chrom = gr) #> # A tibble: 2 × 12 #>   chrom  start    end name  score strand thickStart thickEnd reserved blockCount #>   <chr>  <int>  <int> <chr> <int> <chr>       <int>    <int>    <int>      <int> #> 1 chr1  4.80e6 4.84e6 test…     1 +         4797973  4836816        1          9 #> 2 chr10 4.85e6 4.88e6 diff…     1 +         4848118  4880877        1          6 #> # ℹ 2 more variables: blockSizes <chr>, chromStarts <chr>

what: Read data from bigWig files. — read_bigwig
title: Read data from bigWig files. — read_bigwig
text: Read data bigWig files.

title: Read data from bigWig files. — read_bigwig
code: read_bigwig(   bwfile,   chrom = NULL,   start = NULL,   end = NULL,   as = NULL,   fill = 0 )

title: Read data from bigWig files. — read_bigwig
text: bwfile path URL bigWig file. Remote files (http://, https://, ftp://) supported package installed libcurl available. chrom chromosome(s) read. Either character vector chromosome names, GenomicRanges::GRanges query regions (case start/end ignored; see Details). start start position(s) data. May vector, recycled chrom/end describe several ranges. end end position(s) data. May vector, recycled chrom/start describe several ranges. return data specific type. One "tbl" (default tibble), "GRanges", "Rle". "Rle" returns per-base run-length-encoded vector spanning requested range (see Details). fill value used bases data = "Rle". Defaults 0 (convention coverage); use NA mark uncovered bases missing. Ignored values.

title: Read data from bigWig files. — read_bigwig
text: tibble, GRanges, Rle/RleList depending .

title: Read data from bigWig files. — read_bigwig
text: Multiple ranges can queried one call passing equal-length (length-1, recycled) chrom, start, end vectors, range (chrom[], start[], end[]). Alternatively, pass GenomicRanges::GRanges chrom; regions used directly. GRanges 1-based inclusive bigWig 0-based half-open, region converted start(gr) - 1 end(gr). = "Rle", result S4Vectors::Rle whose expanded length equals queried range, .e. end - start supplied, otherwise extent returned data chromosome. Bases data file set fill. bigWig coordinates 0-based half-open, element corresponds genomic position start + - 1. single-range query returns bare Rle; multi-range (multi-chromosome) query returns named IRanges::RleList one element per range.

title: Read data from bigWig files. — read_bigwig
code: bw <- system.file("extdata", "test.bw", package = "cpp11bigwig")  read_bigwig(bw) #> # A tibble: 6 × 4 #>   chrom start   end value #>   <chr> <int> <int> <dbl> #> 1 1         0     1 0.100 #> 2 1         1     2 0.200 #> 3 1         2     3 0.300 #> 4 1       100   150 1.40  #> 5 1       150   151 1.5   #> 6 10      200   300 2      read_bigwig(bw, chrom = "10") #> # A tibble: 1 × 4 #>   chrom start   end value #>   <chr> <int> <int> <dbl> #> 1 10      200   300     2  read_bigwig(bw, chrom = "1", start = 100, end = 130) #> # A tibble: 1 × 4 #>   chrom start   end value #>   <chr> <int> <int> <dbl> #> 1 1       100   130  1.40  read_bigwig(bw, as = "GRanges") #> GRanges object with 6 ranges and 1 metadata column: #>       seqnames    ranges strand |     score #>          <Rle> <IRanges>  <Rle> | <numeric> #>   [1]        1       0-1      * |       0.1 #>   [2]        1       1-2      * |       0.2 #>   [3]        1       2-3      * |       0.3 #>   [4]        1   100-150      * |       1.4 #>   [5]        1   150-151      * |       1.5 #>   [6]       10   200-300      * |       2.0 #>   ------- #>   seqinfo: 2 sequences from an unspecified genome; no seqlengths  read_bigwig(bw, chrom = "1", start = 100, end = 130, as = "Rle") #> numeric-Rle of length 30 with 1 run #>   Lengths:  30 #>   Values : 1.4  # query several ranges in one call with equal-length vectors read_bigwig(bw, chrom = c("1", "10"), start = c(0, 0), end = c(50, 50)) #> # A tibble: 3 × 4 #>   chrom start   end value #>   <chr> <int> <int> <dbl> #> 1 1         0     1 0.100 #> 2 1         1     2 0.200 #> 3 1         2     3 0.300  # multiple windows on the same chromosome (chrom recycles) read_bigwig(bw, chrom = "1", start = c(0, 100), end = c(50, 130)) #> # A tibble: 4 × 4 #>   chrom start   end value #>   <chr> <int> <int> <dbl> #> 1 1         0     1 0.100 #> 2 1         1     2 0.200 #> 3 1         2     3 0.300 #> 4 1       100   130 1.40   # a multi-range "Rle" query returns a named RleList, one element per range read_bigwig(bw, chrom = "1", start = c(0, 100), end = c(50, 130), as = "Rle") #> RleList of length 2 #> $`1:0-50` #> numeric-Rle of length 50 with 4 runs #>   Lengths:   1   1   1  47 #>   Values : 0.1 0.2 0.3 0.0 #>  #> $`1:100-130` #> numeric-Rle of length 30 with 1 run #>   Lengths:  30 #>   Values : 1.4 #>   # pass a GRanges of regions; 1-based coords are converted automatically gr <- GenomicRanges::GRanges(   c("1", "10"),   IRanges::IRanges(start = c(1, 1), end = c(50, 50)) ) read_bigwig(bw, chrom = gr) #> # A tibble: 3 × 4 #>   chrom start   end value #>   <chr> <int> <int> <dbl> #> 1 1         0     1 0.100 #> 2 1         1     2 0.200 #> 3 1         2     3 0.300

title: cpp11bigwig (development version)
text: New bigbed_info() bigwig_info() report header metadata without reading intervals. bigbed_info() returns field counts embedded autoSql schema, making possible identify BED variant file holds reading (genuine BED12 defined_field_count == 12). bigwig_info() returns version, zoom levels, chromosome count, file-level summary statistics (min/max/mean/std). read_bigbed() now returns BED columns files embedded autoSql schema (e.g. bed12 written bedToBigBed without -). Previously files returned chrom/start/end; reader now falls back field counts file header names columns standard BED field names (extra bedN+ fields become generic fieldN character columns) (#18).

title: cpp11bigwig 0.3.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-06-22 Fix CRAN gcc-san (UBSan) load misaligned address runtime error reading bigBed block packs one record. libBigWig’s bwValues.c, records stored three uint32_t fields followed variable-length name, every record first starts unaligned offset; fields now read memcpy instead aligned uint32_t cast. Multi-range queries now open file per call instead re-opening every range. per-range loop moved C++, query many ranges (especially remote file, open re-fetches headers) substantially faster. read_bigbed() longer crashes bigBed file embedded autoSql schema. bbGetSQL() returns NULL case, constructing std::string undefined behavior; files now read back chrom/start/end columns extra typed fields. bigWig/bigBed readers now release libBigWig file handle read buffer error (e.g. unreadable file failed interval query), rather leaking . Fix CRAN gcc-ASAN global-buffer-overflow reported reading bigBed files. autoSql schema parser longer uses std::regex (tripped AddressSanitizer error inside libstdc++); now parses schema simple string operations. read_bigwig() read_bigbed() can now query multiple ranges single call. Pass equal-length (length-1, recycled) chrom, start, end vectors, GRanges regions via chrom. read_bigwig(= "Rle"), multi-range query returns named RleList one element per range (#18).

title: cpp11bigwig 0.2.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-06-18 read_bigwig() gains = "Rle", returning per-base run-length-encoded vector spanning queried range (Rle single chromosome, named RleList several). Uncovered bases set fill value (default 0; use NA mark missing) (#18). Fix remote access large bigWig/bigBed files. HTTP Range header set, servers returned entire file, crashing R failing open files larger read buffer (#18).

title: cpp11bigwig 0.1.3
text: CRAN release: 2025-12-11 bigBed columns now automatically coerced based autoSql types (#12)

title: cpp11bigwig 0.1.2
text: CRAN release: 2025-08-18 Fix parsing bigBed end coordinates.

title: cpp11bigwig 0.1.1
text: CRAN release: 2025-01-19 Sync libBigWig v0.4.8

title: cpp11bigwig 0.1.0
text: CRAN release: 2025-01-07 Initial CRAN submission.

title: cpp11bigwig 0.0.0.9000
text: libBigWig mostly untouched excpect removal fprintf statements (R won’t allow linked libraries) fixups ASAN errors, mostly GNU-specific pointer arithmetic. cpp11bigwig passes ASAN valgrind checks (via rhub).
